zh.lifeSummary: 當Giles de Erdington於1209年4月12日之前出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾艾爾丁頓時，他的父親Thomas de Erdington25歲，母親Rohese de Cocfelde19歲。他和Margery Ireland至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1268年在英國萊希斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Erdington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from an unidentified place. It may be a metathesized form of Erdington in the West Midlands, which derives its name from the Old English personal name Ēanrēd + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
History: Christopher Edrington is recorded in Rappahannock County, VA, in1666–71.

nameMeanings.name: Giles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Much altered English vernacular form of the Late Latin name Aegidius, from Greek Aigidios (a derivative of aigidion ‘kid, young goat’), via Old French Gide. It was the name of an 8th‐century saint who, according to tradition, was an Athenian citizen who fled to Provence because he could not cope with the fame and adulation caused by his power to work miracles, in particular by healing the lame and crippled. This was not a particularly common name in the Middle Ages and its use seems to have been confined to certain families and localities.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Giles de Erdington was born before 12 April 1209, in Erdington, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas de Erdington, was 25 and his mother, Rohese de Cocfelde, was 19. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Margery Ireland. He died in 1268, in Leicestershire, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Giles de Erdington(이)가 1209년 4월 12일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 르딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Erdington(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Rohese de Cocfelde(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Margery Ireland(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1268년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 사망했다.
